title: ononis natrix subsp. arganietorum
intro: Ononis natrix subsp. arganietorum, commonly known as the Spiny restharrow, is a perennial plant species within the Ononis genus. The Spiny restharrow is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and wounds, due to its health benefits of promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. The Spiny restharrow is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
